title: Make NutritionXP storefront fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop

requirements.text: Implement the NutritionXP storefront UI from the provided HTML into the existing React + Tailwind app and make all pages/sections fully responsive across common breakpoints (mobile 320px+, tablet 768px+, desktop 1024px+), eliminating horizontal overflow and layout breakage.

quotes: i have code for website, make it fully responsive on all types of screens and mobiles

acceptanceCriteria: No horizontal scrolling occurs at 320px, 375px, 768px, 1024px, and 1440px viewport widths (except intentional horizontal carousels).
All text remains readable without manual zooming; headings, body text, and buttons scale appropriately via responsive typography.

All major sections (Header/Nav, Hero, Best Selling Products grid, Gallery, Category scroller, Season’s Bestsellers carousel, Brands slider, Why Choose, Footer/Contact form, Product Detail, Cart, Orders, Notification popup) adapt to small screens without overlap or clipped content.
All images use responsive sizing (e.g., constrained height with object-fit) and do not stretch or overflow containers.
Spacing and alignment remain consistent across breakpoints (no elements off-screen, no unreadably tight padding).

requirements.text: Make the header/navigation responsive by adding a mobile-friendly navigation pattern (e.g., hamburger menu or collapsible drawer), ensuring the logo, nav links, and cart icon remain accessible on small screens.

quotes: make it fully responsive on all types of screens and mobiles

acceptanceCriteria: At <=768px width, nav links do not wrap into multiple cramped rows; navigation is accessible via a toggleable menu.
Cart icon and cart count remain visible and tappable on mobile.
Header remains usable and visually stable when scrolling (sticky behavior preserved or replaced with an equivalent responsive solution).

requirements.text: Refactor fixed/inline sizing in the provided design into responsive Tailwind styles (or equivalent responsive CSS) so hero typography, section paddings, card layouts, and footer columns scale smoothly across breakpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero headings scale down on mobile (no clipping; no forcing two lines off-screen; appropriate top margin/padding).
Section padding reduces appropriately on small screens (e.g., 60px desktop -> ~40px mobile) without crowding content.
Card grids switch from multi-column to 1-column on small screens, 2-columns on tablets where appropriate, and 3+ on larger screens.
Footer switches from multi-column to single column on small screens with correct spacing and readable form controls.

requirements.text: Ensure all interactive storefront flows remain usable on touch devices: product cards, product detail quantity selector, add-to-cart, cart quantity controls, checkout flow, order history, and notification modal (including scroll locking and viewport-fit positioning).

quotes: make it fully responsive on all types of screens and mobiles

acceptanceCriteria: Buttons and tap targets meet mobile usability expectations (no tiny controls; adequate spacing).
The notification popup fits within the viewport on 320px width and can be dismissed reliably (overlay tap and button).
Product detail page stacks image/info vertically on mobile and keeps key actions visible without awkward scrolling.
Cart items layout adapts to small screens without truncating prices, quantity controls, or remove actions.

requirements.text: Choose and apply a coherent visual theme for the responsive React implementation that matches the NutritionXP supplement storefront domain and remains consistent across pages (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling). Avoid blue/purple as primary accents.
acceptanceCriteria: A consistent design system is evident across all pages (shared typography scale, consistent button styles, consistent card styling).
Primary accents are not blue/purple; the theme remains aligned with a dark, performance/fitness aesthetic.
No mixed styling approaches that cause inconsistency (e.g., scattered inline styles that override global look).

constraints: Frontend must be implemented with React + TypeScript using Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui composition (do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui).

Do not modify files listed as immutable in SYSTEM_CONTEXT (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui).
Backend changes are not required for this request; keep all changes in the frontend unless absolutely necessary.
nonGoals: Implementing real payment processing or integrating third-party checkout services.
Adding or changing product/business logic beyond what is necessary to preserve existing UI behavior while making it responsive.
Adding third-party authentication providers beyond Internet Identity.

preferencesToAdd: Use English for user-facing text in build requests.
